prompt: Fact-check lessons 3 and 4 of module 1 and check their Anthropic/OpenAI coverage specifically — I care most about accuracy and both providers being represented correctly.
assertions: Review scope is exactly lessons 03-tool-calling and 04-structured-outputs of module 1 — no other lessons or modules are reviewed.
A fact-check log is present listing individual claims with a per-claim status of verified / contradicted / unverifiable.
At least one volatile API claim (model ID, parameter behavior, tool-calling or structured-output API field/shape) was actually checked against a live or primary source, with the source cited.
The review does not assert a claim is wrong merely because it could not be confirmed; unconfirmed claims are labeled unverifiable.
Anthropic/OpenAI provider parity for these two lessons is explicitly evaluated (both providers represented where the topic is provider-specific).
Standards 1 (factual accuracy) and 4 (provider parity) are given primary weight, per the user's stated emphasis.
Findings cite specific file:line locations and no content file was edited.
A concise chat summary was produced in addition to the full report.
